pages.text: $(o)"They saw you. They forgot you. They chased you. They lost you."$()$(br2)Spy School's retreat scroll. When the fog rises, even the guards forget what they were guarding.

pages.title: Effect
pages.text: Within $(l)48 blocks$(), all hostiles receive:$(br)· Blindness (10s)$(br)· Slowness III (10s)$(br2)$(l)Caster$() gains Invisibility (30s).$(br2)Cost: $(l)3200$() mana.

pages.title: Tactics
pages.text: Retreat, infiltrate, rear-guard.$(br2)Larger range than Eclipse Veil, but only the caster gets stealth — better for solo escape.$(br2)Recommended: $(l)Tier 3 Convergence$() or above.
